result_options.SETTLEMENT_LIMIT: DECLINED — Settlement limit exceeded by receiving exchange.
result_options.AML_DETECTED: BLOCKED — AML screening flagged suspicious activity on beneficiary.
result_options.TRN_INVALID: REJECTED — TRN signature mismatch. Transaction reference not found.
result_options.NETWORK_TIMEOUT: FAILED — Validator quorum unreachable. Network timeout.
result_options.COMPLIANCE_HOLD: HELD — Compliance department requires manual review.
result_options.SANCTIONED_ENTITY: DENIED — Beneficiary matches OFAC/SDN sanctions list.
